content.full_text:
October 19, 2005

Juan Vargas, Assemblymember,
79th District
678 3rd Avenue, #105
Chula Vista, CA 91910-5844

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-210

Dear Assemblymember Vargas:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC") has withdrawn your October 17, 2005, request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act1. As requested by you, advice over the telephone was provided to your staff on October 18, 2005. Therefore your request is withdrawn.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Laurence T. Woodlock
Counsel, Legal Division

LTW:rd

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
